loading_hint: Module ej ḷoade jān CDN. Eḷaññe ej etal wōt, etale koṇōk eo aṃ.
hub.subtitle: Kein jerbal ñan Functional Behavior Assessment, aini ABC data, im Behavior Intervention Plan.
hub.select_student_first: Kālet juon ri-jikuuḷ ilōñ ñan jino
hub.abc_desc: Jeje antecedent, ṃwilin, im consequence ko jān lale
hub.obs_desc: Lale ilo iien-mool: interval, oran-alikkar, ak aetokōn
hub.overview_desc: Wāween ṃwil ko ej itok, jaat ko, im kabwebwein joñak
hub.freq_desc: Bwini ṃōkaj im jootbar oran ko ilo juon minit
hub.interval_desc: Grid ñan time sampling: partial, whole, ak momentary
hub.token_desc: Bwebweik kein kaperan ippān token ko remaroñ kōṃṃan-bareinwōt
hub.hotspot_desc: Kile iien ko eḷap an ṃwil waḷọk ie ilo routine ko
hub.export_desc: Doulōñḷọk ABC data im lale ko āinwōt JSON ak jeje
hub.record_desc: Likūt IEP ak evaluation ñan kobban-iiet kōn AI
hub.hypothesis_desc: Visual A→B→C→Function flow chart kōṃṃane jān AI
hub.goals_desc: AI ej kōṃṃan SMART behavior goals kōn lale wanṃaanḷọk
hub.contract_desc: AI ej je behavior agreement ikōtaan ri-jikuuḷ im ri-kaki
hub.cycle_desc: Acting-Out Cycle eo ewōr 7 phase ippān kilen jipañ
hub.reinforcer_desc: Kile reinforcer ko rejejjet ilo 5 kategori
hub.choice_desc: Kaat in choice ñan ri-jikuuḷ ñan make-jipañ-er
hub.audit_desc: Lajrak in 8 men ñan etale ruuṃ in jikuuḷ ippān nan in jipañ jān AI
hub.triangulation_desc: Keidi 3+ unin data ñan lo convergence
hub.impact_desc: Joñe oran, aetokōn, im oṇāān ṃwil ilo juon iiō
hub.traffic_desc: Kāānjej ñan ri-jikuuḷ ekkar ñan zone ko: būrōrō/iaḷo/maroro
hub.datasheet_desc: Data sheet ko remaroñ kabbōj ñan oran-alikkar, aetokōn, ABC, ak latency
hub.homenote_desc: AI ej je nan in kōnono ñan ri-utiej kōn tone selector
hub.fidelity_desc: AI ej kōṃṃan juon lajrak in BIP raan-otemjej (treatment adherence)
hub.feasibility_desc: Etale ekkar ilo ijoko kōn 5 kajjitōk im AI jipañ
hub.gas_desc: Goal Attainment Scaling ippān descriptor ko jān AI
hub.pocket_desc: BIP summary ekanooj edik āinwōt index-card ñan bōk ilo clipboard
hub.abagraph_desc: Jaat ko rekkar ñan publication ippān phase line, trend line, im visual analysis
hub.abaquiz_desc: Mālejjoñ aṃ jeḷā ABA — bōk juon competency badge ñe 80%+
hub.antecedentmod_desc: AI ej kwaḷọk nan in oktak melan ñan bōbrae ṃwil ṃokta jān aer jino
hub.bcbahandoff_desc: Dashboard in data ñan BCBA + handoff packet emaroñ kabbōj ñan jipañ
hub.biascheck_desc: Jouj in kwaḷọk wāween ko ilo aṃ data ñan kōḷmānḷọkjeṇ kōn implicit bias — eddek, jab bōd
hub.caseload_desc: Mejatoto kilep in ri-jikuuḷ ro otemjej — indicator ko, wāween ko, kakkōl in jọkjọk, im AI caseload summary
hub.casestudy_desc: Case study ko jān AI ippān 4-phase clinical reasoning im scoring
hub.commlog_desc: Tracker in ruo-iaḷ ñan kōnono ippān baaṃle — kōṃṃan bwe ejjeḷọk baaṃle en wōtlọk
hub.condprob_desc: Etale foreground vs background probability ñan kaṃṃool ABC hypothesis ippān data
hub.consent_desc: Form in mālim emaroñ kōṃṃan-bareinwōt ñan jolọk data ippān ri-utiej — ukōte, kabbōj, leḷọk āinwōt JSON
hub.counseling_desc: Role-play kōn AI ippān persona in ri-jikuuḷ ñan kōkātak counseling
hub.cultural_desc: Lajrak in 8 kajjitōk ñan bōjrak im kōḷmānḷọkjeṇ ṃokta jān aṃ kāālōt ṃwil jān cultural humility
hub.cumrecord_desc: Skinner-style cumulative frequency graph — jolet eo an ABA data display
hub.deescalate_desc: Menono kein kaeñ, taimer in lale, kakkije in jouj, im grounding — jipañ in kōlọkjeṇ ilo iien-mool
hub.drstrategy_desc: Kāālōt differential reinforcement strategy eo ejejjet (DRA, DRI, DRO, DRL)
hub.dtt_desc: Discrete Trial Training — jeje trial-by-trial ippān mastery criteria im auto-advance
hub.effectsize_desc: Bwini Tau-U, NAP, im PND ñan joñe an jipañ tōprak ippān visual phase keidi
hub.familyvoice_desc: Form ñan baaṃle ko ñan kwaḷọk aer lale, cultural insights, im ṃōṇōṇō — kōn AI ukok
hub.fbaworkflow_desc: Workflow ko ekkar ñan FBA, BIP, im RTI tier ko ippān AI coaching
hub.fcttemplate_desc: Functional Communication Training karōk ippān kāālōt in modality
hub.gamify_desc: Mood tracker ñan ri-jikuuḷ kōn streak, badge, quest, im journal in kōḷmānḷọkjeṇ
hub.glossary_desc: 25+ naan in ABA emaroñ pukōt ippān melele edik im waanjoñak ilo mour
hub.homelog_desc: Jeje ṃwil ekkar ñan ri-utiej kōn naan ko in raan-otemjej
hub.iepgoals_desc: AI ej kōṃṃan tōl present level, SMART goal, objective, accommodation, im progress monitoring plan
hub.iepprep_desc: Packet in pojak ñan meeting jān AI ippān data summary, talking point, im juon ko reitok
hub.intervention_desc: AI ej kōṃṃan plan in jipañ ñan elōñ wiik ippān goal im milestone
hub.ioacalc_desc: Inter-Observer Agreement kōn 6 wāween — point-by-point, interval, scored/unscored, exact count
hub.latency_desc: Joñe iien jān stimulus ñan response ippān mean, median, im range
hub.maintenance_desc: Lale skill retention ālikin mastery im generalization ilo jikin, armej, im men ko
hub.mtss_desc: Visual 3-tier pyramid ñan jipañ multi-tiered supports ippān tier placement jipañ jān AI
hub.nlabc_desc: Taip ak likūt note in lale ilo Ekkō raan-otemjej — AI ej karōki ñan ABC entry āinwōt make
hub.obscoach_desc: Coaching ilo iien-mool kōn aṃ aini data — kile gap, kwaḷọk wāween ñan kakōṃanṃan, im joñe data
hub.pdpath_desc: Onboarding module ko ñan ekkal skill in ABA jidik-jidik
hub.predict_desc: AI ej kanooj pattern ñan kōnnaan ñāāt, ia, im ta ej kōṃṃan ṃwil — ippān kilen bōbrae
hub.prefassess_desc: Kile reinforcer ilo wāween rejejjet — MSWO, Paired Stimulus, im Free Operant protocol
hub.progressreport_desc: Progress report ko jān AI ippān data summary, trend analysis, goal progress, im naan ñan ri-utiej
hub.qualitycheck_desc: AI ej etale aṃ ABC entry im kwaḷọk wāween ñan kakōṃanṃan
hub.reframe_desc: AI ej je ukok melele in deficit ñan ekkar ñan kajoor in armej
hub.reinforcement_desc: Reinforcer survey karōk — kile ta ej kakijejato kajjojo ri-jikuuḷ ilo 6 kategori
hub.relmap_desc: Visual diagram in connection ko an ri-jikuuḷ — ri-utiej ko reṃool, jeran, baaṃle, mentor — ippān gap analysis
hub.replacebehavior_desc: Map ṃwil ko ej kōṃṃan inepata ñan alternative behavior ekkar ippān kilen kaki
hub.restorative_desc: Script ko jidik-jidik ñan kōkāāl jorrāān, community circle, im reintegration conference
hub.sandbox_desc: Ḷoade ri-jikuuḷ data emaroñ kōṃṃan ñan PD, pre-service training, ak katak ABA ilo ejjeḷọk ri-jikuuḷ eṃool
hub.scatterplot_desc: Grid in iien × ṃwil ñan kile temporal pattern — ej itok ilo make jān ABC data
hub.scdmanager_desc: AB, ABAB, Multiple Baseline, Alternating Treatments, Changing Criterion
hub.selfcheck_desc: Mood check-in im reflection journal ñan ri-jikuuḷ — ñan roñjake aer ainikien
hub.sessionnotes_desc: Note in lale ippān timestamp kōn voice dictation — kile melan eo ñe ej waḷọk
hub.sessiontracker_desc: Joñe ṃwil ilo session karōk ippān rate calculation
hub.snapshot_desc: Doulōñḷọk im bōk JSON snapshot ñan jolọk data ikōtaan ri-utiej im ri-kaki
hub.socialvalidity_desc: TARF im IRP-15 scale ñan joñe an mālim treatment — aikuj ñan publication
hub.taskanalysis_desc: Aikuj skill ñan jekjek emaroñ katakin ippān forward, backward, ak total-task chaining im prompt tracking
hub.teamnotes_desc: Thread in jerbal-ippān-doon ippān timestamp im elōñ jerbal ñan ri-kaki, para, counselor, im ri-utiej
hub.treatintegrity_desc: Jeje eḷaññe intervention ko rej etal āinwōt karōk — component-level fidelity tracking (treatment adherence)
hub.trends_desc: SVG chart ko rej kwaḷọk wāween in intensity, oran in setting, im heatmap in raan/iien
hub.bipgen_desc: Je juon Behavior Intervention Plan jān aṃ data.
hub.cantdowontdo_desc: Kōjepel skill vs. performance deficit ñan kāālōt jipañ eo ejejjet.
hub.competingpathways_desc: Map ṃwil ko rejebar im alternative behavior ṇae problem path eo.
hub.mipractice_desc: Kōkātak MI conversation ippān response in ri-jikuuḷ.
hub.practicum_desc: Etale juon guided practice case jān jino ñan jeṃḷọk.
hub.replacementbehavior_desc: Kile juon alternative behavior eo ej ejaak aikuj eo an ri-jikuuḷ.
abc.setting_placeholder: ewaanjoñak, Ruuṃ in jikuuḷ, Iaḷ, Jikin ṃōñā
overview.empty_desc: Jino aini ABC data ak etale ilo iien-mool ñan lo wāween ko ijin.
token.target_placeholder: ewaanjoñak, Kotake pā ṃokta jān kōnono
hotspot.tap_hint: Uññūr juon cell ñan kalōñ. Klik routine name ñan ukōte.
record.desc: Likūt IEP goal, evaluation report, ak progress note ñan AI etale.
no_entries_match: Ejjeḷọk entry ekkar ñan aṃ filter
quick_fill_label: 🧠 Quick-Fill — Kwaḷọk ta eo eaḷ waḷọk
quick_fill_hint: AI enaaj karōk aṃ melele ñan field ko itulaḷ. Innām kwoj maroñ ukōte ilo peiṃ.
generating_questions: ⏳ Ej kōṃṃan kajjitōk ko ekkar ñan melan...
